title: Treat Simplified-Traditional variant conversion as context-dependent

detect.signal: Web-facing Chinese Text is being reviewed or transformed across Simplified and Traditional Chinese, and the string contains characters whose mapping depends on meaning or locale context, such as `发` mapping to `發` or `髮`.
ignore_when: The string has already been reviewed against a project glossary or translation memory for the target locale.
The apparent variant is part of a proper name, quoted historical text, source title, user-generated content, or legal text that must preserve original wording.
The project has a documented Project Override for the target locale, variant policy, and glossary entry covering the observed text.
The task does not involve variant conversion, target-locale review, or script consistency.
The text is not rendered to end users, such as source comments, internal documentation, debug logs, or synthetic fixtures.

rationale: CLReq notes that Simplified and Traditional Chinese mappings are not always one-to-one and can depend on context. Agents should not mechanically convert variant-sensitive text without target locale, glossary, or human review.

clreq.title: Requirements for Chinese Text Layout (CLReq)
clreq.section: Characters & encoding: Characters used for Chinese Composition

examples.context: Traditional Chinese i18n string that appears to come from mechanical Simplified conversion.

examples.good:
新品发售：护发套装

or confirm reviewed `zh-Hant` wording before converting.

agent_guidance.comment_template:
[strong] clreq.variants.contextual-hans-hant-conversion: This Chinese variant conversion needs semantic or locale review.

影响： CLReq notes that Simplified-Traditional mappings are not always one-to-one, so mechanical conversion can choose the wrong character for the intended meaning.
Suggested change: Confirm the target script or locale and use a glossary-backed or human-reviewed string before changing the text; for example, `发` may need `發` or `髮` depending on meaning.
Source: CLReq, Characters used for Chinese Composition.
Confidence: medium
agent_guidance.autofix_notes: Do not apply Simplified-Traditional conversion automatically. Even when the target script is known, variant-sensitive words need glossary or human confirmation before edits.
agent_guidance.decision_notes: If the locale is bare `zh` or otherwise ambiguous, ask for the target locale first and lower confidence. If a project glossary exists, follow it and cite the Project Override in the Review Suggestion.
